name: Listen Mode handles missing notes gracefully
description: Verify Listen Mode does not crash when the user has no notes or topics to generate audio from. Should show a clear empty state.

planSteps.description: Log in with the test credentials and navigate to /app/listen.
The Listen Mode page renders without crashing. A heading or title containing 'Listen' is visible.
Either a topic selector is visible, or a clear empty-state message explaining no content is available for audio generation.
No JavaScript errors or blank white screen. The page layout (sidebar, header) is intact.
